code: import{getWithFallback,patchWithFallback,postWithFallback}from'./http';let customersDb=[{id:'1',name:'Ana Paula Nunes',email:'ana.nunes@provedor.com',plan:'400 Mega',status:'Ativo'},{id:'2',name:'Bruno Oliveira',email:'bruno.oliveira@provedor.com',plan:'600 Mega',status:'Ativo'},{id:'3',name:'Carla Mendes',email:'carla.mendes@provedor.com',plan:'200 Mega',status:'Suspenso'},{id:'4',name:'Diego Santos',email:'diego.santos@provedor.com',plan:'1 Giga',status:'Ativo'},{id:'5',name:'Erika Lima',email:'erika.lima@provedor.com',plan:'400 Mega',status:'Ativo'},{id:'6',name:'Felipe Costa',email:'felipe.costa@provedor.com',plan:'600 Mega',status:'Suspenso'}];export const fetchCustomers=async()=>{return getWithFallback('/customers',()=>[...customersDb],250);};export const fetchCustomerById=async id=>{return getWithFallback(`/customers/${id}`,()=>{const found=customersDb.find(customer=>customer.id===id);return found||null;},180);};export const createCustomer=async input=>{return postWithFallback('/customers',input,()=>{const newCustomer={id:String(Date.now()),name:input.name.trim(),email:input.email.trim(),plan:input.plan.trim(),status:input.status};customersDb=[newCustomer,...customersDb];return newCustomer;},220);};export const updateCustomer=async(id,input)=>{return patchWithFallback(`/customers/${id}`,input,()=>{const index=customersDb.findIndex(customer=>customer.id===id);if(index<0){return null;}const updated={...customersDb[index],name:input.name.trim(),email:input.email.trim(),plan:input.plan.trim(),status:input.status};customersDb=customersDb.map(customer=>customer.id===id?updated:customer);return updated;},220);};
